Professional profile

Backend Engineer para
entornos empresariales críticos

Backend engineer focused on corporate ecosystems where availability, traceability and transactional accuracy are business-critical requirements.

Specialized in Java, Spring Boot and Oracle in production-grade environments, including critical integrations and batch processing.

Business impact

Featured
enterprise project architecture

Each project highlights technical decisions designed to protect continuity, reduce risk and deliver measurable business outcomes.

Logistics · Microservices

Corporate logistics tracking platform

Improved operational stability and reduced logistics tracking incidents during high-demand periods.

Java 21Spring BootJPA/HibernateOracleREST APIsDocker
Latency reduction 84%
Production uptime 99.9%
Response window 5s→800ms
Hide details Show details ⌃

Problem

The business required reliable event traceability across multiple logistics actors and external systems with asynchronous state transitions.

Architecture

Modular architecture based on Spring Boot services, Oracle persistence and transactional workflow orchestration with step-level confirmations.

Solution

  • ✓ Retry policies with backoff
  • ✓ correlation logging and confirmation mechanisms were implemented to prevent duplication and event loss.
Finance · Batch

High-volume financial batch system

Better execution times and fewer operational errors in recurring financial closing cycles.

Java 17Spring BatchOracleAdvanced SQLLinuxCI/CD
Latency reduction 67%
Production uptime 99.8%
Response window 2.4h→55m
Hide details Show details ⌃

Problem

Financial operations needed to process large nightly volumes within strict processing windows.

Architecture

Batch pipeline with Spring Batch, partitioned workloads, strong transaction controls and execution traceability per job/step.

Solution

  • ✓ Critical queries were optimized
  • ✓ commit/rollback strategies were improved and pre/post consistency validations were added.

Professional track

Career in
high-impact corporate environments

International Corporate Company

2022 - Present

Full-time · Remote

Senior Backend Engineer

Architecture modernization of transaction-critical services for international corporate operations.

  • › Reduced response times in critical services through data access optimization.
  • › Led architectural refactors that improved maintainability and horizontal scalability.
  • › Integrated external systems with resilient error handling and stability controls.
Java Spring Boot Oracle REST APIs

Regional Transactional Platform

2019 - 2022

Full-time · On-site

Backend Developer

Development of high-volume batch workflows for reconciliation and daily business processing windows.

  • › Improved Oracle database performance through SQL optimization and relational modeling adjustments.
  • › Implemented reliable batch processes for reconciliations and high-volume data loads.
  • › Worked under corporate standards, technical reviews and established engineering practices.
Java Spring Batch Oracle Linux

Delivery approach

From analysis to
production systems

A structured methodology that ensures quality, predictability and measurable outcomes in every engagement.

01

Technical analysis and domain understanding

Understand business context, operational risks and core objectives before defining solutions.

›

02

Corporate-aligned architecture design

Design for enterprise standards, scalability, maintainability and technical governance.

›

03

Quality-driven implementation

Build with testing, documentation and maintainability criteria from day one.

›

04

Optimization and continuous improvement

Monitor, tune performance and evolve systems safely over time.

Engineering principles

Principles behind
every architecture decision

They are not just best practices. They are commitments that define the quality of every delivered system.

Domain-Driven Architecture

Systems that mirror business reality. Every technical decision stays aligned with domain models to improve evolution and maintainability.

Clean and Maintainable Code

Readable, structured and documented code. It reduces technical debt and improves collaboration across distributed engineering teams.

Stability and Consistency

Data integrity as a non-negotiable priority. Robust transactions and active prevention of inconsistent states in critical systems.

Scalable Systems

Architectures designed to grow with business demand. Capacity can increase without structural redesign.

Resilience by Design

Failure-aware engineering with recovery, retries and graceful degradation to sustain service continuity under stress.

International Standards

Engineering aligned with global enterprise practices, including governance frameworks, audits and compliance controls.
